zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy於大約1270年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓時，他的父親Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy45歲，母親Catrin ferch Madog21歲。他和Joan Ferch Llewellyn至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1315年住在英國威爾斯凱爾費利凱爾費利。他去世於大約1340年在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy于大约1270年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根卡多斯頓时，他的父亲Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy45岁，母亲Catrin ferch Madog21岁。他和Joan Ferch Llewellyn至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他于1315年住在英国威尔斯凱爾費利凱爾費利。他去世于大约1340年在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gronow
meanings: Welsh: relationship name from the Welsh personal name Goronwy (also found as Gronw and Gronow, from Old Welsh Guorgonui).

nameMeanings.name: Rhûn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: "Gronwy"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy was born about 1270, in Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, was 45 and his mother, Catrin ferch Madog, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Joan Ferch Llewellyn. He lived in Caerphilly, Caerphilly, Wales, United Kingdom in 1315. He died about 1340, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy est né environ 1270, à Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Catrin ferch Madog, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Ferch Llewellyn. Il a vécu à Caerphilly, Caerphilly, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni en 1315. Il est décédé environ 1340, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy um 1270 in Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy 45 und seine Mutter Catrin ferch Madog 21. Er hatte mit Joan Ferch Llewellyn mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1315 hat er in Caerphilly, Caerphilly, Wales, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb um 1340 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy è nato il circa 1270 nel Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Catrin ferch Madog, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Joan Ferch Llewellyn. Vissuto a Caerphilly, Caerphilly, Galles, Regno Unito nel 1315. Morì circa 1340, nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwyが約1270年にウェールズグラモーガンカドクストンで生まれた時，父Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwyは45歳，母Catrin ferch Madogは21歳であった。彼はJoan Ferch Llewellynとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1315年にはイギリスウェールズケエルフィリーケエルフィリーに住んでいた。彼は約1340年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy(이)가 대략 1270년 웨일스 글램르건 카도스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Catrin ferch Madog(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Joan Ferch Llewellyn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1315년도에 영국 웨일스 카이르필리 카이르필리에서 살았다. 그는 대략 1340년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Catrin ferch Madog, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Joan Ferch Llewellyn. Ele viveu em Caerphilly, Caerphilly, Gales, United Kingdom em 1315. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1340, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhûn "Gronwy" ap Gronwy родился около 1270 г. в местности кадокстон, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Catrin ferch Madog, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Joan Ferch Llewellyn. Он жил в местности каирфилли, каирфилли, Уэльс, Великобритания в 1315 году. Он умер около 1340 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Joan Ferch Llewellyn. Vivió en Caerphilly, Caerphilly, Gales, Reino Unido en 1315. Murió aproximadamente 1340, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
